mapper.insert: INSERT INTO editor_document_revision (document_id, version_no, snapshot, message, created_by) VALUES (#{documentId}, #{versionNo}, cast(#{snapshot} as jsonb), #{message}, #{createdBy})
mapper.select: SELECT id, document_id, version_no, snapshot::text as snapshot, message, created_by, created_at FROM editor_document_revision WHERE document_id = #{documentId} ORDER BY version_no DESC
